name: Cooked Wild Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the wild rice and water in a small saucepan.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil.
3. Reduce the heat to a bare simmer, cover, and cook until the rice is tender (1 to 1 1/4 hours).
4. While cooking the rice, sauté the bacon until golden brown and crisp, then drain on a paper towel.
5. Cut the bacon crosswise into thin julienne strips and set aside.
6. When the rice is done, gently stir in the butter with a fork until melted.
7. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
8. Just before serving, toss the rice with the bacon strips.
Makes 1 cup
